mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND status IN ('OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND status IN ('OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND due_date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_documents WHERE delete_flg = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_documents WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND uploaded_at >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notices WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND status = 'DRAFT'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notices WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND type = 'URGENT' AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
